description: Ground-based MegaCam benchmark cases. Populate local files under benchmark_data/megacam/ to activate these cases.

cases.source_identifier: CADC public MegaCam sparse-field control selected by MegaPrime query
cases.cadc_query: SELECT TOP 1 Plane.publisherID FROM caom2.Plane AS Plane JOIN caom2.Observation AS Observation ON Plane.obsID = Observation.obsID WHERE Observation.collection = 'CFHT' AND Observation.instrument_name = 'MegaPrime' AND Observation.type = 'OBJECT' AND Plane.dataRelease < '2015-01-01' ORDER BY Plane.publisherID

cases.source_identifier: CFHT Elixir-calibrated science exposure with held-out dark residual injection
cases.cadc_query: SELECT TOP 1 Plane.publisherID FROM caom2.Plane AS Plane JOIN caom2.Observation AS Observation ON Plane.obsID = Observation.obsID WHERE Observation.collection = 'CFHT' AND Observation.instrument_name = 'MegaPrime' AND Observation.type = 'DARK' AND Plane.dataRelease < '2010-01-01'
